generated_oml:
instance VehicleTelemetrySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor-based data acquisition pipeline gathering telemetry from the physical vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleTelemetryDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleTelemetryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleTelemetrySensor
]

instance VehicleTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry data transmitted from the sensor, used for model calibration and monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleTelemetryDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm updates model parameters with live sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance MonitoringModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring module assesses safety and performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyPerformanceMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller optimises driving strategy."

]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault-detection algorithm identifies anomalous conditions through state estimation."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance OptimisationRoutine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimisation routine generates improved control policies."
    DTDFVocab:enables DrivingStrategyOptimizationService
]

instance VehicleSimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine that runs physics‑based vehicle dynamics simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveVehicleDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance DataAnalyticalEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Analytical engine providing data‑driven decision support for maintenance and design evaluation."
    DTDFVocab:enables MaintenanceDecisionSupportService
]

instance PhysicsBasedVehicleDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based differential‑equation model representing the vehicle’s dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleSimulationEngine
]

instance SafetyPerformanceMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring of safety and performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyThresholdViolationInsight, TriggerCorrectiveAction
]

instance PredictiveVehicleDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of vehicle dynamics under current operating conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationPredictionInsight
]

instance DrivingStrategyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimisation of driving strategies via supervisory controllers."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationRecommendationInsight, ControlParameterTuningAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through state‑estimating algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance MaintenanceDecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data‑driven decision support for maintenance and design evaluation."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that updates model parameters based on calibration algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationSuccessInsight
]

instance SafetyThresholdViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety and performance metrics have violated defined thresholds."
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detected by state‑estimating algorithms."
]

instance SimulationPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted vehicle behaviour from the calibrated physics‑based model."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization routine recommends improved driving strategies."
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Maintenance recommendation based on data‑driven analysis."
]

instance CalibrationSuccessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration of model parameters successful."
]

instance PromptHumanOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Prompt human operator when safety thresholds are violated."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically trigger corrective actions when safety thresholds are violated."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically provide predictive maintenance recommendation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "DT is described as a framework that integrates modelling, simulation, monitoring and optimisation technologies. Its internal architecture consists of a data layer that collects sensor streams from the physical twin over time, a models layer that stores knowledge about both cyber and physical aspects of the system and its environment, and an algorithms layer that includes calibration routines, fault detectors, supervisory controllers, state estimators and optimisers. Calibration algorithms continually update the model parameters to reflect the best estimate of the system state, and the resulting model states are fed into monitoring components that assess whether the system operates safely and optimally. Decision logic—whether human or algorithmic—can act on monitoring outputs to adjust the physical twin. This orchestrated workflow demonstrates a component‑centric architecture with coordinated data‑model‑algorithm interactions, supporting real‑time data ingestion, model updating, and safety/optimality checks."
]
